_source: Scraped from https://criteriontheatre.co.uk/tickets on 2026-05-21. Static snapshot — refresh manually before each show week if prices or category labels change.
_runtime_state_note: The 'tonight_state' field below is the per-performance availability state. FoH operator toggles it via the announcement templates (tonight-sold-out / tonight-few-tickets). Default is 'available'. obs-helper reads this when rendering the tickets-walkins slide (preview id P13) and substitutes the appropriate overlay treatment.

booking.box_office: in person at the foyer, or via website

_per_performance_event_ids._notes: Direct booking links per night. Useful for QR codes on the next-production slides. Scraped from the seat-selection anchors on /tickets.
